name: Bottle Flip Challenge
author: Poki
description: Bottle Flip Challenge is a skill game that puts your precision to the test as you aim to make the bottle land perfectly on the table. Swipe up to flip the bottle. The higher your flip, the more challenging it becomes. It's a frustrating yet incredibly fun and addictive game! Can you win the ultimate Bottle Flip Challenge? How to play Bottle Flip Challenge? Swipe up to flip the bottle. Who created Bottle Flip Challenge? Bottle Flip Challenge is created by Happylander Ltd. Play their other games on Poki: Bowling Champion ! How can I play Bottle Flip Challenge for free? You can play Bottle Flip Challenge for free on Poki. Can I play Bottle Flip Challenge on mobile devices and desktop? Bottle Flip Challenge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
